mapper.sql: id, order_no, user_id, duration_id, duration_value, tier_id, tier_value, total_amount, odic_amount, group_id_no, live_status, begin_time, end_time, channel_name, channel_id, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, is_deleted
mapper.select: select o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.duration_id, o.duration_value, o.tier_id, o.tier_value, o.total_amount, o.odic_amount, o.group_id_no, o.live_status, o.begin_time, o.end_time, o.channel_name, o.channel_id, o.remark, o.create_time, o.update_time, o.create_by, o.update_by, o.is_deleted, IFNULL(m.idno, '') AS user_idno, IFNULL( (select gx.idno from t_group gx where o.group_id_no is not null and trim(o.group_id_no) != '' and (gx.id = trim(o.group_id_no) or gx.idno = trim(o.group_id_no)) limit 1), '' ) AS tidno_group from t_live_order_record o left join t_member m on m.id = o.user_id where o.id = #{id} and o.is_deleted = 0

select o.id, o.order_no, o.user_id, o.duration_id, o.duration_value, o.tier_id, o.tier_value, o.total_amount, o.odic_amount, o.group_id_no, o.live_status, o.begin_time, o.end_time, o.channel_name, o.channel_id, o.remark, o.create_time, o.update_time, o.create_by, o.update_by, o.is_deleted, IFNULL(m.idno, '') AS user_idno, IFNULL( (select gx.idno from t_group gx where o.group_id_no is not null and trim(o.group_id_no) != '' and (gx.id = trim(o.group_id_no) or gx.idno = trim(o.group_id_no)) limit 1), '' ) AS tidno_group from t_live_order_record o left join t_member m on m.id = o.user_id where o.order_no = #{orderNo} and o.is_deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.update:
update t_live_order_record
order_no = #{orderNo},
user_id = #{userId},
duration_id = #{durationId},
duration_value = #{durationValue},
tier_id = #{tierId},
tier_value = #{tierValue},
total_amount = #{totalAmount},
odic_amount = #{odicAmount},
group_id_no = #{groupIdNo},
live_status = #{liveStatus},
begin_time = #{beginTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
channel_name = #{channelName},
channel_id = #{channelId},
remark = #{remark},
create_by = #{createBy},
update_by = #{updateBy},
is_deleted = #{isDeleted},
update_time = now()
where id = #{id}
